en: How’s the weather today?

ab: makecele sa bekela, anikalrata ‘ongolo sa tholake ka acilai.
ch: B:天氣有點冷，要多喝熱水。
en: It’s a bit cold, so you need to drink more warm water.
How’s the weather today?

ab: drangedrang tokakalra kai vaiyana, la tokakalra ’ongolro sa acilray.
en: It’s a bit hot, so you need to drink more water.
How’s the weather outside?

ab: madraw kai vay, ki karimorimoro kilalribaka ki vay.
en: The sun is bright and remember to wear sunscreen.
How’s the weather outside?

ab: makalra kwadra emeeme, kadrwa vay sobelebeleng.
en: There are a lot of clouds but no sun in the sky.
How is the weather tomorrow?

ab: makalra ka emeeme,si madraw kai sasevera, misaka kadroi vaivay loza.
ch: B:明天沒有太陽，雲很多，風很大。
en: It will be cloudy and windy but not sunny tomorrow.
How was the weather that day?

ab: kai vaiyana kakecelre, lo mo latadre ai siyata sabelebelenga ka ki’ing.
ch: B:這天有點冷，出門要穿外套。
en: It was a bit cold and you needed to wear a jacket when you went outside.

ab: lo taisadra lai miyakakwa kai vaiyana?
en: How’s the weather on the weekend?

ab: lo taisadra mathariri kai vaiyana vaivay.
en: It will be sunny on the weekend.
Will it be rainy that day?

ab: lo idrana vaivay, lai nikai odaodale.
ch: B:那天天氣晴朗，不會下雨。
en: It will have no rain and be sunny that day.
Will it be rainy that day?

ab: eene, takamiya ai odaodale idra vaiyana.
en: Yes, it will be rainy that day.
Is it raining now?
The rain stops and the sun comes out.
Is it raining now?
It is raining and I don’t have an umbrella with me.
Is it raining outside?

ab: ini, kadrowa ‘odaodale kaiyasa, lo makatokodrali ai odaodale, lo molatadre ai ’iloko sa soko.
ch: B:現在沒有下雨，中午過後會下雨，出門要帶傘。
en: It is not raining now, but it will be rainy in the afternoon, so you need to bring an umbrella when you go out.

ab: lo cayli kalakecelra ai kakecelre akalringaw?
en: Will it be very cold in winter next year?

ab: eene, ai kakecelre akalringaw lo cayli, ai tokalra si ki’ing.
ch: B:是，明年冬天會很冷，要穿很多衣服。
en: Yes, it will be very cold in winter next year, so you need to put on extra layers.
Will it be very hot in summer this year?

ab: eene, kai kaladraidraza ai madrangedrang, ai ’ongolo sa acilay makalra.
ch: B:是，夏天會很熱，要多喝水。
en: Yes, it will be very hot and you need to drink more water.
Do you like spring?

ab: madalamako ki kalariyariga, madralrede kai vaiyana.
ch: B:我喜歡春天，天氣很溫暖。
en: I like spring because the weather is warm.
Do you like autumn?

ab: naok madalame ki kalakekecelra, asilroiyasi kai kalakekecelra makalra ka sasevara.
ch: B:我不喜歡秋天，秋天有好多颱風。
en: I don’t like autumn because there are lots of typhoons in autumn.
